title: Harris Ultimate Aluminium Oxide Sandpaper - Medium 4 Pack
description: The Harris Ultimate Aluminium Oxide Medium Sandpaper is your must-have for superior surface preparation. We've specifically engineered this abrasive paper for maximum durability and ultimate clog resistance, drastically improving your efficiency and the quality of your finish. This medium grit is the perfect all-rounder for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike. Use it to effortlessly: Prep Bare Wood: Remove saw marks, smooth grain, and prepare surfaces for staining or varnishing. Refine Filler: Level out patches and repairs to create a perfectly seamless base. Smooth Semi-Rough Surfaces: Take down imperfections on previously painted or primed areas. The paper is exceptionally flexible, making light work of awkward shapes, intricate door mouldings, and contoured edges that standard sandpaper can struggle with. This means a consistently smooth base, which is the secret to a truly professional paint or varnish job. Product Specifications: Abrasive Material: Premium Aluminium Oxide Grit: Medium (Ideal for smoothing and removing minor imperfections) Quantity: 4 Sheets per Pack Brand: Harris – Trusted for quality decorating tools since 1928. Get the Ultimate Preparation tool for your next project and experience the difference a quality abrasive makes.
